queue_item.action: Require exact authorized signer identity, OIDC issuer, source repository, and workflow reference before evidence promotion.

progress.finding: A valid signature and verified certificate chain do not authorize a signer by themselves. Keyless verification must bind the verified certificate identity and OIDC issuer to an explicit policy; repository and workflow-ref claims must also match exactly to prevent lookalike or cross-workflow authorization.
progress.verification: Six deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using behaviorally identical committed logic and inputs.
progress.trust_limit: The classifier consumes externally verified identity fields; it does not parse certificates, verify chains, authenticate OIDC tokens, validate transparency or time evidence, or prove claim truth.

queue_item.handoff: Vercel and Cloudflare evidence promotion should run this gate only after cryptographic certificate verification and alongside R-004 trusted-builder, R-005 DSSE/transparency, and R-006 signing-time decisions. All four predicates must pass independently.

preservation_rule: Do not overwrite operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json, other teams' queue updates, or Git history.
